title: Background Notifications, Links Panel & Guest UX

changes.title: True background notifications via Service Worker
changes.description: A service worker (sw.js) is now registered on first load. When you grant notification permission the SW is activated and, on supported browsers (Chrome 80+), Periodic Background Sync is scheduled so you receive message alerts even while the tab is closed. The SW handles notification click events — clicking a notification focuses the app and automatically joins the right room.

changes.title: Notification permission prompt upgraded
changes.description: Accepting the notification banner now also registers the service worker and schedules background sync in one step. The opt-in banner copy has been updated to make the background-delivery benefit clear.

changes.title: Guest 'msgs left' badge hidden for logged-in users
changes.description: The guest trial badge was only guarded at render time. When a user registered or logged in the badge could persist from the current session. applySessionToUi() now explicitly removes the badge and dismisses the lock overlay the moment a session is established.

changes.title: 'DMs coming soon' replaced with real DM navigation
changes.description: The openOrCreateDm stub now delegates to openDMWithUser instead of showing a toast placeholder. The dropdown 'My Closets' button uses openDmListPanel (already implemented) with a fallback that opens the Closets tab in the profile modal.

changes.title: My Links panel is live
changes.description: The 'My Links' dropdown item previously showed 'Links panel coming soon!'. openUserLinksPanel() is now implemented: it opens the profile modal and switches directly to the Shared Links tab where you can view, copy, edit expiry, manage whitelists, see viewer stats, and delete tracked links.
